# Builder God Skill

Use this meta skill for prompts like:
- build this end-to-end
- implement this feature fully
- ship this from idea to production

## Fused skills
- context-engineering-kit
- superpowers-skill
- task-master-skill
- planning-with-files-skill
- web-artifacts-skill
- tdd-guard
- owasp-security
- claude-mem

## Workflow
1. Convert prompt into execution plan and milestones.
2. Implement in vertical slices.
3. Enforce TDD gates and security checks.
4. Run validation and produce done criteria.
5. Store key decisions in memory notes.

## Output contract
- Plan
- Implementation
- Tests and security review
- Final delivery summary
